summary: Block 147: Clutter-Free Feed Logic - ALL TESTS PASS. Tested backend feed filtering (discogs_import exclusion, captionless NOW_SPINNING/COLLECTION_UPDATE/RANDOMIZER exclusion) and frontend composer button disabled states. All 10 backend tests pass. All frontend UI tests pass.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Block 147 clutter-free feed logic is fully implemented and tested. Backend GET /api/feed excludes discogs_import posts and captionless NOW_SPINNING/COLLECTION_UPDATE/RANDOMIZER posts. Frontend composer buttons are disabled until caption has >=1 char. Daily Prompt requires caption and has correct placeholder text.

verified_features.notes: Text: 'Only posts with comments will be shared on The Honey Groove feed.' is displayed in ComposerBar

verified_features.feature: Now Spinning: Post button disabled when caption empty
Haul: Submit button disabled when caption empty
ISO: Submit button disabled when caption empty
verified_features.notes: iso-submit-btn disabled until isoCaption.trim() is non-empty

verified_features.feature: Randomizer: Post button disabled when caption empty
Daily Prompt: 'post to hive' button disabled when caption empty

verified_features.notes: Placeholder is 'Share your thoughts on this prompt...'

verified_features.feature: Backend GET /api/feed excludes captionless NOW_SPINNING posts
verified_features.notes: Backend filters out posts where post_type in (NOW_SPINNING, COLLECTION_UPDATE, RANDOMIZER) and caption is empty
Explore feed applies same filtering rules
